TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ryohen Itiniay i Nan'ao Cen no Yilan ko Ryohen a niyaro', 178 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 569 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 534 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 35 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal90%, Amis1%, Truku1%, Bunun1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: rjo~uńß…ôn itiniaj i nan °ao~u ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u rjo~uńß…ôn a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
S.FORM: Ryohen Itiniay i Nan'ao Cen no Yilan ko Ryohen a niyaro', 178 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 569 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 94% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin, polong han i, 534 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 6% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 35 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Tayal90%, Amis1%, Truku1%, Bunun1%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: rjo~uńß…ôn itiniaj i nan °ao~u ¶…ôn no~u ji…ĺan ko~u rjo~uńß…ôn a nijaro~u °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u paro~u…¨~…ģ no~u …ĺo~uma °, *** ko~u sa °o~usi no~u tam…¨~…ģaw. **% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u jin ¶o~umin, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, *** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, *% ko~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u ro~uma a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan, po~u…ĺo~uŇč ńßan i, ** ko~u tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u ka °a…ĺo~uman no~u tam…¨~…ģaw no~u kasafina ¶a…¨~…ģan i, ko~u taja…ĺ**%, amis*%, tro~u~uko~u~u*%, b~b~vo~u~uno~u~un*%. ira ko~u pi ¶o~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģan i nijaro~u °.
